.gitignore.general_idea: Replace minimal .gitignore with a comprehensive template covering multiple IDEs, build tools, OS artifacts, and security-sensitive files.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced 'target' and 'Idea' entries with a full list including build/, .idea/, .vscode/, .env, *.key, etc.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Renamed the Spring Boot application name to be more descriptive.
Removed embedded MongoDB configuration in favor of a standard external MongoDB connection.
Enabled automatic index creation for MongoDB entities.
Configured Jackson to serialize dates as ISO-8601 strings instead of timestamps.
Configured Jackson to ignore unknown properties during deserialization.
Externalized the server port configuration to use an environment variable with a default.
Adjusted the minimum response size for compression from 1000 to 1024 bytes.
Explicitly defined MIME types for server-side compression.
Exposed Spring Boot Actuator endpoints for health, info, metrics, and Prometheus.
Configured health endpoint to show details only when authorized.
Enabled environment variable exposure in the Spring Boot info endpoint.
Configured SpringDoc OpenAPI paths and sorting options for Swagger UI.
Set specific logging levels for root and application packages.
Defined a custom console logging pattern.
Added application metadata (name, version, description) to the info endpoint.
